question: T-007 is one of the high-voltage transmission units in the fleet. List its asset metadata and the full set of sensors currently installed, and flag whether the available instrumentation covers both electrical and thermal monitoring needs.
effective_question: T-007 is one of the high-voltage transmission units in the fleet. List its asset metadata and the full set of sensors currently installed, and flag whether the available instrumentation covers both electrical and thermal monitoring needs.
answer:
The asset metadata for T-007 is:

- transformer_id: T-007
- name: Power Transformer T-007
- manufacturer: Siemens
- location: Industrial Park A
- voltage_class: 132kV/33kV
- rating_kva: 5000
- install_date: 2011-03-03
- age_years: 13
- health_status: 0
- fdd_category: 1
- rul_days: 3860
- in_service: true

The full set of sensors currently installed on T-007 are:

- load_current_a (A)
- oil_temp_c (°C)
- power_factor
- voltage_hv_kv (kV)
- voltage_lv_kv (kV)
- winding_temp_top_c (°C)

The available instrumentation covers electrical monitoring needs (load_current_a, power_factor, voltage_hv_kv, and voltage_lv_kv) but does not cover thermal monitoring needs (only oil_temp_c and winding_temp_top_c are available, which is not sufficient for comprehensive thermal monitoring).
